settings.eyebrow: FUTURISTIC STREETWEAR FOR THE NEXT ERA
settings.heading: Wingstone
settings.text: Cinematic drops, sharp silhouettes, and a quieter premium experience built for the Wingstone world.
settings.announcement_text: LIMITED RELEASE / NEW DROP / FUTURE STREETWEAR / WINGSTONE WORLD / EDITORIAL FITS

settings.heading: Built like a campaign, not a catalog.
settings.subtext: Each product card should feel editorial, collectible, and clearly part of the Wingstone universe.

settings.title: Cinematic presentation
settings.text: Large imagery, restrained spacing, and strong type make each product feel like a drop, not a listing.

settings.title: Cleaner navigation
settings.text: Fewer choices, better labels, and a route structure that keeps people moving through the brand world.

settings.title: Meaningful drops
settings.text: Tags, metafields, and collection naming work together so the storefront can evolve without new templates.

settings.heading: Get early access
settings.text: New drops, restocks, and release notes before the storefront goes public.
